case_number: Miscellaneous Appeal is dismissed as not

chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI M.A. No.05 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Hearing (priority) case 1. For hearing of main case. 2. For hearing of CMA No.899/2017 (stay)..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 16.10.2023 Mr. Imran Hussain, Advocate for the appellant..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Mr. Imran Hussain, counsel for the Appellant submits that he has been advised not to proceed with this matter and hence, this Miscellaneous Appeal is dismissed as not pressed along with pending application(s), if any. JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
